% P1 Lattice NIZK Benchmark Figure — BFV Sigma + SLAP Protocol
% Generated by bench/p1/run.sh
% Requires: pgfplots, tikz
\documentclass[border=4pt]{standalone}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{pgfplots}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}

\begin{document}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------
% Data sourced from bench/p1/results-{128,512,1024}.json
% Measured on: AMD RYZEN AI MAX+ 395 w/ Radeon 8060S, Linux 6.8.0
% Date: 2026-05-13 (post Round 3 remediation, BFV sigma v4 active)
% Protocol: BFV sigma (lattice-native) + SLAP NIZK, q=65537, 100 iterations each
% Note: BFV sigma proof dominates at ~616 KB; times are O(1) in n due to
% fixed CRT limb count — the protocol proves RLWE ciphertext well-formedness
% per CRT limb, not per ring coefficient.
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------
% Macro definitions for measured values:
\newcommand{\BenchProveA}{17.40}     % n=128 median_prove_ms
\newcommand{\BenchProveB}{17.11}     % n=512
\newcommand{\BenchProveC}{17.22}     % n=1024
\newcommand{\BenchVerifyA}{2.06}     % n=128 median_verify_ms
\newcommand{\BenchVerifyB}{1.73}     % n=512
\newcommand{\BenchVerifyC}{1.72}     % n=1024
\newcommand{\BenchSizeAKB}{602.1}    % n=128 proof_size KB (616,566 B)
\newcommand{\BenchSizeBKB}{602.1}    % n=512 proof_size KB (616,566 B)
\newcommand{\BenchSizeCKB}{602.1}    % n=1024 proof_size KB (616,567 B)
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------

\begin{tikzpicture}
\begin{axis}[
  title={\textbf{pvthfhe-P1 BFV Sigma + SLAP NIZK: Prove \& Verify Latency vs.\ $n$}},
  xlabel={Ring degree $n$},
  ylabel={Latency (ms)},
  xmode=log,
  log basis x={2},
  xtick={128,512,1024},
  xticklabels={128,512,1024},
  ymin=0,
  ymajorgrids=true,
  grid style=dashed,
  legend style={at={(0.02,0.98)}, anchor=north west},
  width=10cm,
  height=7cm,
]

% ---- Prove time ----
\addplot[
  color=blue,
  mark=square*,
  thick,
] coordinates {
  (128,  \BenchProveA)
  (512,  \BenchProveB)
  (1024, \BenchProveC)
};
\addlegendentry{Prove (pvthfhe-P1)}

% ---- Verify time ----
\addplot[
  color=red,
  mark=*,
  thick,
] coordinates {
  (128,  \BenchVerifyA)
  (512,  \BenchVerifyB)
  (1024, \BenchVerifyC)
};
\addlegendentry{Verify (pvthfhe-P1)}

% ---- Advisory threshold (100 ms prove) ----
\addplot[
  color=gray,
  dashed,
  domain=64:2048,
] {100};
\addlegendentry{Prove threshold (100 ms)}

% ---- Advisory threshold (50 ms verify) ----
\addplot[
  color=orange,
  dashed,
  domain=64:2048,
] {50};
\addlegendentry{Verify threshold (50 ms)}

\end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}

% -----------------------------------------------------------------------
% Proof size vs n
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------
\begin{tikzpicture}
\begin{axis}[
  title={\textbf{pvthfhe-P1 BFV Sigma + SLAP NIZK: Proof Size vs.\ $n$}},
  xlabel={Ring degree $n$},
  ylabel={Proof size (KB)},
  xmode=log,
  log basis x={2},
  xtick={128,512,1024},
  xticklabels={128,512,1024},
  ymin=0,
  ymajorgrids=true,
  grid style=dashed,
  legend style={at={(0.02,0.98)}, anchor=north west},
  width=10cm,
  height=7cm,
]

\addplot[
  color=violet,
  mark=triangle*,
  thick,
] coordinates {
  (128,  \BenchSizeAKB)
  (512,  \BenchSizeBKB)
  (1024, \BenchSizeCKB)
};
\addlegendentry{Proof size (pvthfhe-P1)}

% ---- Note: BFV sigma proof is CRT-limb-fixed, hence O(1) in n ----
\addplot[
  color=gray,
  dashed,
  domain=64:2048,
] {620};
\addlegendentry{Approx size bound (620 KB)}

\end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}

\end{document}
